results.title: Playwright Python
results.description: Playwright is a Python library for automating Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit browsers with a single API, offering evergreen, capable, reliable, and fast automation.

results.title: Playwright
results.description: Playwright is a framework for Web Testing and Automation, enabling cross-browser testing of Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit with a single API.

results.title: Playwright
results.description: Playwright is a Node.js library for end-to-end testing, automating Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit browsers. It enables cross-platform testing on Windows, Linux, and macOS, supporting headless/headed modes and mobile emulation.

results.title: Playwright Java
results.description: Playwright for Java is a library that automates Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit with a single API, built for reliable and fast cross-browser web automation.

results.title: Playwright
results.description: Playwright enables reliable end-to-end testing for modern web apps across all browsers, platforms, and languages with features like auto-wait and tracing for resilient testing.

results.title: Playwright PHP
results.description: Playwright PHP is an experimental PHP library that enables modern browser automation for Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit, allowing developers to write reliable end-to-end tests with PHPUnit integration.

results.title: Playwright Go
results.description: Playwright for Go is a library to automate Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit with a single API, enabling reliable and fast cross-browser web automation.

results.title: Playwright for Python
results.description: Playwright for Python is a framework for reliable end-to-end testing and automation of modern web applications, supporting all Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit browsers.

results.title: Playwright .NET
results.description: Playwright for .NET is the official language port of Playwright, enabling cross-browser web automation for Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit with a single API.

results.title: Playwright for .NET
results.description: Playwright for .NET is a framework for reliable end-to-end testing of modern web applications across all browsers and platforms, featuring powerful tools like codegen and trace viewer.

results.title: Laravel Playwright
results.description: Laravel Playwright is a library that integrates Playwright with Laravel, providing a set of endpoints and tools to help developers write end-to-end (E2E) tests for their Laravel applications, enabling interaction with artisan commands, models, and databases from Playwright tests.

results.title: Playwright AWS Lambda
results.description: Playwright AWS Lambda provides support for running Playwright, a Node.js library to automate Chromium, Firefox and WebKit with a single API, on AWS Lambda and Google Cloud Functions.

results.title: Playwright for Elixir
results.description: Playwright for Elixir is an Elixir library designed to automate Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit browsers with a single API, enabling reliable and fast cross-browser web automation.

results.title: ReportPortal Agent JS Playwright
results.description: An agent designed to integrate Playwright, a web automation framework, with ReportPortal, a test automation dashboard.

results.title: Scrapy Playwright
results.description: 🎭 Playwright integration for Scrapy

results.title: Wally
results.description: A Clojure Playwright wrapper

results.title: Capybara Playwright Driver
results.description: A Capybara driver that integrates Playwright, making it easy to introduce Playwright for browser automation in Rails applications.

results.title: Guidepup Playwright
results.description: Integrates Guidepup with Playwright for writing screen reader tests, automating VoiceOver on macOS and NVDA on Windows with full control and mirroring real user experiences.

results.title: Playwright for Go
results.description: A Go library designed to automate Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit browsers using a single API. It provides tools for end-to-end testing, web scraping, and browser automation.

results.title: n8n Playwright
results.description: n8n-community-node-package for browser automation using Playwright

results.title: Mock Service Worker Playwright
results.description: MSW Playwright provides a better developer experience for mocking APIs in Playwright tests by integrating Mock Service Worker with Playwright's network interception capabilities.

results.title: Zerostep
results.description: Supercharge your Playwright tests with AI

results.title: Playwright CRX
results.description: Playwright for chrome extensions

results.title: Playwright Ghost
results.description: Playwright-ghost is an overlay for Playwright that adds plugins to mask differences between human-operated browsers and headless browsers.

results.title: Cloudflare Playwright
results.description: A fork of Playwright modified for compatibility with Cloudflare Workers and Browser Rendering, enabling browser automation within the Cloudflare ecosystem.

results.title: Playwright MCP
results.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides browser automation capabilities using Playwright, enabling LLMs to interact with web pages through structured accessibility snapshots without needing vision models.

results.title: Playwright Azure Reporter
results.description: A Playwright reporter that integrates with Azure DevOps to publish test results, supporting test case IDs via test names or tags, and offering flexible configuration options for test runs.

results.title: Stagehand
results.description: Stagehand is an AI web browsing framework compatible with Playwright, offering simple AI APIs for building durable, self-healing, and repeatable web automation workflows via natural language.

results.title: Playwright With Fingerprints
results.description: A Playwright plugin that allows changing browser fingerprints and generating virtual identities for enhanced anonymity and stealth, using the FingerprintSwitcher service.

results.title: Supawright
results.description: Supawright is a Playwright test harness for E2E testing with Supabase, capable of creating and cleaning up database tables and records recursively.
